agency: New York City Board of Elections (BOENY)
method: Outside-in crawl (browser UA, robots-respecting). Drupal 9 site; JSON:API disabled (404). Key pages (poll site locator, election-results-summary, candidates, contest list, important notices) sampled; results/candidates/contests found to be PDFs. Open Data checked under agency 'Board of Elections (BOENY)'.
headline_findings: The least-modernized domain in the project: Drupal 9 with JSON:API disabled (no site API), and only 2 Open Data assets (poll sites).

The two things voters most need — candidates (who's running) and results — have NO API and NO dataset; they are PDFs (one Recap + one EDLevel PDF per contest) plus a separate legacy viewer (enr.boenyc.gov).
Poll sites ARE machine-readable: Voting/Poll Sites (29 cols) + Election District Poll Sites (4 cols) on Open Data; election district geometry via DCP.
Ballot request/tracking is a separate app (requestballot.vote.nyc) with no public API.
This is the original pre-open-data low-hanging-fruit case, largely untouched — the sharpest validation of 'data liberation only partially worked.'

apis_observed.note: separate legacy app; no documented data API.

fruit.name: Poll Sites (locator)
fruit.notes: The one well-covered resource: poll site locations with accessibility (handicap/voter entrance), geo, and admin boundaries.

fruit.name: Election Districts
fruit.notes: ED boundaries published by DCP; ED→poll-site mapping by BOENY.

fruit.name: Election Results
fruit.notes: One 'Recap' + one 'EDLevel' PDF per contest, foldered by election date under /sites/default/files/pdf/election_results/. Live results only in enr.boenyc.gov. NO machine-readable results anywhere. The flagship gap.

fruit.name: Candidates
fruit.notes: Candidate lists / announcements as PDFs. No dataset. Who's-running has no API.

fruit.name: Contests / Ballot
fruit.notes: Per-election contest lists + random-draw ballot positions as PDFs. What's-on-my-ballot has no API.

fruit.name: Elections / Important Dates
fruit.notes: Election calendar + petition/certificate filing calendars as PDFs.

fruit.name: Ballot Request / Tracking
fruit.notes: Absentee/mail-ballot request + tracking. Separate app, no public API. The net-new write surface.
